courses.description: LINEAR ALGEBRA, NUMERICAL AND COMPLEX ANALYSIS

projects.title: ZConnect
projects.description: Engineered a resilient full-stack video platform using WebRTC, Node.js, and JavaScript, enabling real-time audio/video communication. Designed and applied a custom signaling server using WebSockets to manage peer-to-peer connections, enabling room creation, participant management, session control, and real-time presence for seamless multi-user communication in scalable apps. Developed a modular Node.js backend using Express.js to handle API routing and signaling logic, ensuring responsiveness and scalability. Implemented video stream management with real-time track replacement and screen sharing, enhancing collaboration and adaptability. Integrated end-to-end user authentication using JWT tokens, enabling secure access control for private video rooms and maintaining user sessions. Built a real-time chat module with synchronized message timestamps, typing indicators, and join/leave tracking, integrated with live video stream. Applied mobile-first design with responsive layouts and touch-optimized controls, ensuring seamless usability across smartphones and desktops.

projects.title: BalanceBox
projects.description: Enhanced a modern full-stack personal finance web application to enable real-time tracking and in-depth analysis of user financial activities, integrating intuitive dashboards and visualizations to improve user engagement and promote stronger financial awareness. Constructed an interactive and responsive frontend using React and JavaScript, with a strong focus on component reusability, modular architecture, and enhanced type safety through TypeScript integration to minimize runtime errors and improve maintainability. Established a high-performance backend using Node.js and Express.js to manage all data transactions, adhering to RESTful architecture principles. Integrated secure JWT-based authentication with bcrypt-hashed passwords, enabling protected login/registration flows and route access control. Implemented robust CRUD operations for income, expenses, and category entities, empowering users to manage financial records with minimal latency. Created and normalized a scalable MongoDB schema using Mongoose, enabling efficient storage and retrieval of user-specific financial data.

projects.title: CodeForge
projects.description: Enhanced a full-stack web application replicating version control features such as commits, branching, merging, and repository forking, backed by a persistent and stateful backend with user authentication, access control, detailed change history tracking, and real-time collaboration support. Designed and executed a custom version control engine to manage branches and visualize commit history, enabling efficient code collaboration. Leveraged the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js) to build scalable, maintainable architecture enabling collaborative development. Engineered advanced branching and merging logic, with manual conflict resolution tools and merging for non-conflicting changes, enhancing collaboration. Applied JWT authentication with bcrypt password hashing, enabling users to manage private repositories securely. Utilized Redux Toolkit and React Context for efficient state management of repositories and user sessions, enhancing scalability and maintainability.

projects.title: Resume Builder
projects.description: Built a single-page web application using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, enabling non-technical users to create professional, customizable resumes. Created an intuitive, mobile-first user interface using responsive CSS, ensuring a seamless user experience across desktops, tablets, and smartphones. Executed PDF export using jsPDF and html2canvas, enabling users to generate pixel-perfect, print-ready resumes from the web app. Executed customizable themes and layout options, allowing users to personalize resumes by selecting font styles, color palettes, section arrangements, and spacing preferences for a tailored and professional appearance across various devices and print formats. Executed form validation and autosave using localStorage, ensuring data integrity and enhancing reliability during long editing sessions. Ensured semantic HTML structure and incorporated accessible design practices to enhance usability and compatibility with assistive technologies.
